name: Matt Hughes
oneLiner: The early welterweight title-control case: real championship volume, physical dominance, and one of the defining reigns before the GSP era.
compareShortCase: Hughes is one of the defining welterweight champions: a physical, title-winning force from the earlier UFC era with real championship volume and a long list of important wins.
compareCounter: The knock on Hughes is era context. His welterweight run was historically huge, but the division was not as deep or modernized as later welterweight eras.
